multi-process.description: Start Health Monitoring in Multi-Process Mode (Specify the number of multiple processes (default 1))

disable-auto-adjust.description: Disable the Health Check Rate Auto Adjustment

external-rate.description: Define the External Health Check Rate (Number of External Script Programs (default 2))

per.description: Specify the Unit Time for the rate (Specify the Unit Time, multiple of 100ms)

up-retry.description: Specify the Healthcheck Retries before declaring target up (Up-retry count (default 1))

interval.description: Specify the Healthcheck Interval (Interval Value, in seconds (default 5))

timeout.description: Specify the Healthcheck Timeout (Timeout Value, in seconds (default 5), Timeout should be less than or equal to interval)

rpn-string.description: Enter Reverse Polish Notation, example: sub hm1 sub hm2 and

database-name.description: 'mssql': Specify MSSQL database; 'mysql': Specify MySQL database; 'oracle': Specify Oracle database; 'postgresql': Specify PostgreSQL database;

db-row.description: Specify the row number for receiving

db-column.description: Specify the column number for receiving

db-column-integer.description: Specify the column number for receiving

dns-ipv4-fqdn.description: Specify fully qualified domain name expected in DNS response answer

dns-ipv4-recurse.description: 'enabled': Set the recursion bit; 'disabled': Clear the recursion bit;

dns-domain.description: Specify fully qualified domain name of the host

dns-domain-port.description: Specify DNS port, default is 53 (DNS Port(default 53))

dns-domain-type.description: 'A': Used for storing Ipv4 address (default); 'CNAME': Canonical name for a DNS alias; 'SOA': Start of authority; 'PTR': Domain name pointer; 'MX': Mail exchanger; 'TXT': Text string; 'AAAA': Used for storing Ipv6 128-bits address;

http-host.description: Specify "Host:" header used in request (enclose IPv6 address in [])

http-maintenance-code.description: Specify response code for maintenance (Format is xx,xx-xx (xx between [100, 899]))

override-ipv4.description: Override implicitly inherited IPv4 address from target

override-port.description: Override implicitly inherited port from target (Port number (1-65534))

status-code.description: 'status-code-2xx': Enable passive mode with 2xx http status code; 'status-code-non-5xx': Enable passive mode with non-5xx http status code;

passive-interval.description: Interval to do manual health checking while in passive mode (Specify value in seconds (Default is 10 s))

sample-threshold.description: Number of samples in one epoch above which passive HC is enabled. If below or equal to the threshold, passive HC is disabled (Specify number of samples in one second (Default is 50). If the number of samples is 0, no action is taken)

threshold.description: Threshold percentage above which passive mode is enabled (Specify percentage (Default is 75%))

disable-after-down.description: Disable the target if health check failed

interval.description: Specify the Healthcheck Interval (Interval Value, in seconds (default 5))

timeout.description: Specify the Healthcheck Timeout (Timeout Value, in seconds(default 5), Timeout should be less than or equal to interval)

template-server-ssl.description: Server side SSL template for health monitor (Server side SSL Name)

ssl-ciphers.description: Specify OpenSSL Cipher Suite name(s) for Health check (OpenSSL Cipher Suite(s) (Eg: AES128-SHA256), if the cipher is invalid, would give information at HM down reason)

ssl-dgversion.description: Lower TLS/SSL version can be downgraded

default-state-up.description: Initial health state will default to UP

ldap-encrypted.description: Do NOT use this option manually. (This is an A10 reserved keyword.) (The ENCRYPTED password string)

ldap-run-search.description: Specify a query to be executed

AcceptResRef.description: Mark server up on receiving a search result reference response

AcceptNotFound.description: Mark server up on receiving a not-found response

rtspurl.description: Specify URL string (Specify the path on the server)

rtsp-port.description: Specify RTSP port, default is 554 (Port Number (default 554))

database-name.description: 'mssql': Specify MSSQL database; 'mysql': Specify MySQL database; 'oracle': Specify Oracle database; 'postgresql': Specify PostgreSQL database;

db-encrypted.description: Do NOT use this option manually. (This is an A10 reserved keyword.) (The ENCRYPTED password string)

db-row.description: Specify the row number for receiving

db-column.description: Specify the column number for receiving

db-row-integer.description: Specify the row number for receiving

db-column-integer.description: Specify the column number for receiving

ntp-port.description: Specify the NTP port, default is 123 (Port Number (default 123))

kinit-encrypted.description: Do NOT use this option manually. (This is an A10 reserved keyword.) (The ENCRYPTED password string)

kadmin-encrypted.description: Do NOT use this option manually. (This is an A10 reserved keyword.) (The ENCRYPTED password string)

kpasswd-encrypted.description: Do NOT use this option manually. (This is an A10 reserved keyword.) (The ENCRYPTED password string)

kpasswd-server.description: Specify the Kerberos password server, host|ip [:port]

http-version.description: 'http-version2': HTTP version 2 for HTTPs; 'http-version3': HTTP version 3 for HTTPs;

https-host.description: Specify "Host:" header used in request (enclose IPv6 address in [])

https-expect.description: Specify what you expect from the response message

https-response-code.description: Specify response code range (e.g. 200,400-430) (Format is xx,xx-xx (xx between [100, 899])

response-code-regex.description: Specify response code range with Regex (code with Regex, such as [2-5][0-9][0-9])

https-url.description: Specify URL string, default is GET /

url-type.description: 'GET': HTTP GET method; 'POST': HTTP POST method; 'HEAD': HTTP HEAD method;

post-type.description: 'postdata': Specify the HTTP post data; 'postfile': Specify the HTTP post data;

https-postdata.description: Specify the HTTP post data (Input post data here)

https-postfile.description: Specify the HTTP post data (Input post data file name here)

https-maintenance-code.description: Specify response code for maintenance (Format is xx,xx-xx (xx between [100, 899])

https-encrypted.description: Do NOT use this option manually. (This is an A10 reserved keyword.) (The ENCRYPTED password string)

https-key-encrypted.description: Do NOT use this option manually. (This is an A10 reserved keyword.) (The ENCRYPTED password string)

tacplus-encrypted.description: Do NOT use this option manually. (This is an A10 reserved keyword.) (The ENCRYPTED password string)

tacplus-secret.description: Specify the shared secret of TACACS+ server

tacplus-port.description: Specify the TACACS+ port, default 49 (Port number (default 49))

rpn-string.description: Enter Reverse Polish Notation, example: sub hm1 sub hm2 and

multi-process.description: Start Health Monitoring in Multi-Process Mode (Specify the number of multiple processes (default 1))

disable-auto-adjust.description: Disable the Health Check Rate Auto Adjustment

external-rate.description: Define the External Health Check Rate (Number of External Script Programs (default 2))

per.description: Specify the Unit Time for the rate (Specify the Unit Time, multiple of 100ms)

up-retry.description: Specify the Healthcheck Retries before declaring target up (Up-retry count (default 1))

interval.description: Specify the Healthcheck Interval (Interval Value, in seconds (default 5))

timeout.description: Specify the Healthcheck Timeout (Timeout Value, in seconds (default 5), Timeout should be less than or equal to interval)

file-name.description: External health monitor script file name

description.description: Describe health external monitor script briefly

src-file.description: Source external health monitor script file name

dst-file.description: Destination external health monitor script file name

file-name.description: External health monitor script file name
External health monitor script file name

description.description: Describe health external monitor script briefly

src-file.description: Source external health monitor script file name

dst-file.description: Destination external health monitor script file name
